abstract.text: This struct defines a keyboard-specific theme, which can
be used to define a bunch of styles at once.

inlineContent.text: A theme can be copied, tweaked, styled, etc. This struct
it share copy logic with its style variation.
KeyboardKit Pro unlocks a bunch of predefined themes and
style variations, as well as a theme-based style service.

abstract.text: This view can be used to list theme collections in a
vertical list, with horizontally scrolling shelves.
